name: Remember
description: Recall facts, terms, basic concepts. Questions test memorisation.
example: What is the capital of France?

name: Understand
description: Explain ideas or concepts in your own words.
example: Explain the difference between TCP and UDP.

name: Apply
description: Use information in new situations or solve problems.
example: Given the data set, calculate the standard deviation.

name: Analyse
description: Draw connections, compare, contrast, or break down information.
example: Compare the time complexity of merge sort vs. quick sort.

name: Evaluate
description: Justify a decision or position; critique or assess.
example: Evaluate whether a NoSQL database is appropriate for this use case.

name: Create
description: Produce new or original work; design or construct.
example: Design a database schema for an e-commerce platform.
